## Materials
- Old School | 6 Hole Baseplate | Independent Skateboard Trucks: The 6 holes baseplates are adaptable to both recent skateboard decks and old-school ones. All non-forged models in 109, 159, 169, and 215 sizes come with 6 hole baseplates.
- Skateboard Truck Base Plates - 5150 Skate Shop: Skateboard Truck Base Plates Transform your skateboard's performance with our high-quality truck base plates! Crafted for strength and stability, these base plates ensure a solid connection between your truck and deck, enhancing your ride's responsiveness and control.
- 6 Hole Baseplate + Kingpin | Independent Skate Trucks Canada: Independent Trucks 6 hole universal baseplate with grade 8 kingpin. Fits Stage 11 and most other stage Independent trucks and old school or modern hole pattern decks.
